description: Navigate to the Wikipedia page 'List of countries and dependencies by population' (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_and_dependencies_by_population). Programmatically extract the country names and population figures from the main table. Save the data as a CSV with headers 'Country,Population' to '/home/ga/Desktop/country_populations.csv', ensuring the file contains at least 50 rows. Additionally, create a log file at '/home/ga/Desktop/extraction_log.txt' documenting the source URL and the total number of rows extracted.

metadata.occupation_context: Intelligence Analyst - collecting structured data from open web sources
